items.title: Show HN: How LLMs Work – Interactive visual guide based on Karpathy's lecture
items.description: All content is based on Andrej Karpathy's "Intro to Large Language Models" lecture (youtube.com/watch?v=7xTGNNLPyMI). I downloaded the transcript and used Claude Code to generate the entire interactive site from it — single HTML file. I find it useful to revisit this content time to time. items.title: Show HN: Tolaria – Open-source macOS app to manage Markdown knowledge bases
items.description: Hey there! I am Luca, I write https://refactoring.fm/ and I built Tolaria for myself to manage my own knowledge base (10K notes, 300+ articles written in over 6 years of newslettering) and work well with AI.Tolaria is offline-first, file-based, has first-class support for git, and has strong opinions about how you should organize notes (types, relationships, etc).Let me know your thoughts! Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47882697 Points: 201 # Comments: 76
